prompt: Create a deliberately rough, hand-drawn digital doodle on a plain white background, like quick Microsoft Paint line art with uneven black outlines, flat colors, scribbled shading, and a playful amateur anime style. Show a single flying fantasy battle maid knight, a young anime woman with bright blonde hair streaming wildly backward, large blue eyes, a small open surprised smile, and a white frilly maid headband with tiny dark flower details. She is posed diagonally as if lunging through the air from upper left to lower right, holding one thin rapier in her forward hand, with the blade extending far to the left and a simple circular hand guard. Her outfit combines maid clothing and armor: shiny silver shoulder pauldrons and chest armor over a white bodice, brown belts and a gold buckle at the neck, a short white frilled skirt with circular spiral decorations, white thigh-high stockings with lace trim, and white armored shoes with small gold accents. Add a dramatic turquoise blue scarf or cape whipping behind her to the right, painted with energetic scribble strokes and darker blue at the far end. Use minimal detail but clear recognizable shapes, visible construction-like sketch lines, messy yellow hair strokes, gray armor strokes, and a whimsical action-fantasy feeling, with no text and no background scenery.
